arts.ttl: Newcastle United title race truth amid Alexander Isak fear and transfer gamble
arts.sum: The scars of losing a 12-point lead in the Premier League title race back in 1996 will never go away - even if Newcastle go on to win half a dozen top-flight trophies. With games against Chelsea (h), Nottingham Forest (h), Liverpool (a) and Man City (a), Newcastle can lay a glove on the teams in the title race.

arts.ttl: Chelsea react and make surprise claim after Newcastle United nightmare comes true
arts.sum: "I'm not worried in case Newcastle win and go ahead of us. Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca has claimed he was 'not worried' by the prospect of Newcastle United leapfrogging his side into fourth place.

arts.ttl: North London is red and are Newcastle title contenders? - Football Weekly Extra
arts.athr: Presented by Max Rushden with Barry Glendenning, Philippe Auclair and Dan Bardell. Produced by Joel Grove and our executive producer is Danielle Stephens.
arts.sum: Max Rushden is joined by Barry Glendenning, Philippe Auclair and Dan Bardell as Arsenal beat Spurs to reignite their title challenge Rate, review, share on Apple Podcasts, Soundcloud, Audioboom, Mixcloud, Acast and Stitcher, and join the conversation on Facebook, Twitter and email. On the podcast today; Arsenal win the north London derby at a canter – Spurs never really looked in it even at 1-0 up. Is pressure growing on Ange Postecoglou and can Arsenal’s defence paper over other cracks in the side and lead them to glory? Continue reading...

arts.ttl: FC Volendam bring in former Ajax, Newcastle United and Leeds United midfielder on a free transfer
arts.sum: Dutch second tier side FC Volendam have announced the signing of 35-year-old Vurnon Anita on free transfer. The veteran midfielder has signed for the side who were relegated from the…

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon comments to Alexander Isak are just the tip of the iceberg for Newcastle United
arts.sum: But if Isak is Newcastle United's headline act, Gordon is more than a respectable supporting artist at the moment. As the cameras panned on to Gordon, he could be seen saying to Isak: "That's so unselfish, so unselfish." And that is exactly where Eddie Howe has his team at the moment.

arts.ttl: Max Aarons mentions Norwich City repeatedly in Valencia presser – Asked about longer Bournemouth exit
arts.sum: Max Aarons was keen to remind people of his time at Norwich City when discussing his move to Valencia from Bournemouth today. That’s at least if Super Deporte’s coverage is anything to go by, as they cite the defender continually referencing Norwich City in his press conference today. Aarons was announced as a new Valencia The post Max Aarons mentions Norwich City repeatedly in Valencia presser – Asked about longer Bournemouth exit appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Westerlo set to bring in veteran Algerian striker formerly of Lyon, Leicester City and Newcastle
arts.sum: Het Nieuwsblad are reporting that Westerlo are working on a deal to sign veteran Algerian striker Islam Slimani. The 36-year-old spent the second half of each of the past two…

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak chasing the record - The longest scoring streaks in Premier League history
arts.sum: 'Who put the ball in the Mackems net, Alexander Isak' was once again ringing around St James' Park on Wednesday night. And the truth is the Swedish striker is putting the ball in every opponent's...

arts.ttl: Newcastle chant return speaks volumes after Aston Villa loan as Howe gets wish
arts.sum: Newcastle also have a formidable midfield trio in Sandro Tonali, Bruno Guimaraes and Joelinton, who are capable of going up against any side in the Premier League right now. Beating any Premier League side 3-0 is no mean feat yet Howe spoke about how 'we have to be hard on ourselves in this moment for our own success' following the victory against Wolves on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer Rumours: Sesko, Isak, Zubimendi lead the way on Arsenal January Wishlist
arts.sum: Morale is high at the Emirates following Wednesday’s North London Derby win over Tottenham. Arsenal have closed the gap to league leaders Liverpool to four points, albeit having played a game mo...
